name: Kids' Hair Towel Green Checkered - Pillowfort™: Extra Lightweight Cotton Terry, Machine Washable, 9"x23"
description: Make morning prep for your little one easy with this Checkered Hair Towel from Pillowfort™. Made from 100% terry cotton, this printed hair towel feels soft while being absorbent for quickly drying off their hair. Best of all, it features an elastic loop and button at the back for keeping it in place. Featuring a checkered print in shades of green with dark green trim, it's sure to add sweet style to their bathing routine.
